latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC1 — GET /leaderboard returns oracle_points DESC top 20
latestValidationChecks.evidence: leaderboard.js queries ORDER BY constellation_points DESC LIMIT $1 (default 20); routes.js exposes GET /leaderboard; registered in app.js; node --check passed

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC2 — match win increments player_stats.total_wins+1 and total_matches+1
latestValidationChecks.evidence: finaliseMatch in turn-scheduler.js upserts player_stats for every non-NPC participant: total_matches+1 always, total_wins+$isWinner; node --check passed
oracle/routes.js step 10 does INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE SET oracle_sent+1 immediately after point deduction; node --check passed

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC4 — LeaderboardScreen rank-1 entry shows accent-gold badge
latestValidationChecks.evidence: LeaderboardScreen.gd: is_top3 = rank<=3 sets border_color=ACCENT_GOLD, bg_color=Color(ACCENT_GOLD,0.12), rank emoji badge [🥇,🥈,🥉]

latestValidationChecks.criterion: AC5 — logged-in player row highlighted with accent-purple border
AC6 — 랭킹 보기 navigates to LeaderboardScreen; 돌아가기 returns to CharacterListScreen
latestValidationChecks.evidence: CharacterListScreen.gd emits leaderboard_requested signal via 랭킹 🏆 button; LeaderboardScreen.gd emits back_requested signal via 돌아가기 button — matches signal-based navigation pattern used throughout project
